reviews.review_description: Well i downloaded the app but when i opened it it doesnt play and it had a fixed picture download pizza street or something like that and no action was performing
Fun and I learned quite a bit. There is a LOT of stereo 360 video in this. Files are large, but worth downloading.

developer_response.body:
Hi TTCOnlineCreative!

Thanks for the review! We're quite proud of the amount of video in this. 

Thanks!
Smithsonian Journeys: Venice Development Team

reviews.review_description:
Thank you for such a wonderful free app. Using this app makes me feel like I really am in Venice. 

I have to disagree with pads1970 review - having the 360 degree emersion is incredible. While the tour guide is speaking I can look around at everything going on. Venice is the perfect location for full 360 degree VR.

I do wish some of the scenes were longer and that the image were sharper, but that's just the way things are in these early days of VR. Looking forward to ultra high def, true life displays one day. But for now this is brilliant!

developer_response.body:
Hi MattFrom1972m,

Thanks so much for the awesome review! We're glad you enjoyed your virtual trip to Venice. What other locations besides Venice would you like to visit in VR?

Thanks,
Smithsonian Journeys: Venice Development Team

reviews.review_description: There are loads of photos now downloaded from this app. Not happy about that as it should warn you if it is taking up so much space. Otherwise very good if not old.

I've been to Venice a couple of times but nice to see it in this perspective. Would be more interesting for those who haven't been there though..... P. S. Thanks for your reply! I'm a bit of a Venice buff, so I know the history very well, but it's still a fantastic video even for people who have been there but don't know the history.. :)

developer_response.body:
Hi Maccyb123! 

Happy to see that you liked the experience :) Thanks for reviewing! Did you get to learn something new about the city? I love Venice and have been there before as well, but I learned a lot from Dr. Bartlett that I didn't know before.

Thanks! Smithsonian Journeys: Venice Development Team

Hi scoobybus.jones!

I'm sorry to hear that you are having difficulty with Smithsonian Journeys: Venice and I wanted to reach out to you to see if I could help.  Speaking from personal experience, I know that it can be frustrating when you try to play an app and it doesn't work. I'd love to be able to solve this problem with you. Can you tell me any specifics of what is happening when you try to play the app? What phone and headset version are you using? 

Thanks,
Smithsonian Journeys: Venice Development Team

reviews.review_title: Great tour but I am not an owl.
reviews.review_description:
Loved the free tour of Venice. Great presenter and great views of the city. The sound quality was poor on a couple of clips but was by and large it was fine.

The clips did take a long time to load. 
In my opinion 180 clips would be a better format. Used by Amaze for example. I don't want/need to spin around 360 to watch something. I get that it's VR but sometimes less is more.

Still, I'm interested in your next tour and this free one was still great. Well done.

developer_response.body:
Hi pads1970,

Thanks for the awesome review! We thought a lot about whether we should try to shoot this in 180 or 360 and in the end we went with 360 because, even though it is a little harder to do and lower in resolution, it feels more immersive in the end. When you are on a tour of a city, even if you are following a tour guide, you tend to look around and sightsee in all directions. We wanted to capture that feeling for our audience. It has its drawbacks to be sure, but it also gives you the freedom to experience the location like you were there yourself. Maybe it was the wrong choice, maybe not. But this was a fun experiment to try in the early days of VR, no?
Glad you enjoyed your virtual trip to Venice. What other locations would you want to see next?

Thanks,
Smithsonian Journeys: Venice Development Team

reviews.review_description:
Interesting narrative. But image and sound quality could be a lot better, as well as the user interface.

UPDATE: 
Thanks for the response, developers. I'll give you three examples of apps/experiences I consider to have very good image quality (either 360 3D or 180 3D):

1) Any app from Felix and Paul studios, for example Nomads. 
2) NextVR content, for example NBA.
3) The most viewed videos in the app Amaze.

As for the sound, I don't think the recording equipment is the problem. But something went wrong with the processing, so I get lots of robotic sounds and volume variations during the narration. 
Best regards.

UPDATE 2:
One more star for your kindness and effort.

developer_response.body:
Hi MikeUrilorib!

You are on point. Felix and Paul have the sharpest and best 3D 360 image quality of any VR videographers! They are the North Star we are all chasing. We'll look into the audio processing and see if we can fix any of the robotic sounds you are hearing. Glad you enjoyed the narrative and I promise you that we are doing our best to improve the video quality!

Thanks for the review!
Smithsonian Journeys: Venice Development Team

reviews.review_description: Stuck on title screen. Tried deleting and reinstalling still stuck.
but thats ok i dont need this game im so disappointed about downloading

developer_response.body:
Hi blocker_5417, We'd love to be able to solve this problem for you. Can you tell us which phone and headset you are using?

UPDATE: Ok. S6 Edge. 1. Are you using a white or a black Gear VR headset? 2. Do you have enough storage on your phone to handle the entire download? Unlike a lot of Samsung phones, the S6 does not have a removable Micro SD card. If you can free up some space on your drive, you might be able to download another tour. 

Thanks, Smithsonian Journeys: Venice Development Team

reviews.review_description: To me, this is what VR is about. It’s not a developed example but I wish there were more apps like this instead of the heaps of mindless and boring games they keep churning out ad nauseam.

It won't let me download the other 4, walking, grand canal, etc. The basillica was awesome so would love to see the rest
EDIT: I'm sorry, my phone won't let me reply. 
Yes, I can see all tours in basillica. I can click on the download, and sometimes I get the message and sometimes I don't. Even when I do get it, it doesn't download. 
Thank you for trying to help!  I can't wait for the safari one.

developer_response.body:
Hi marymcgregor01,

Let's see if we can get this sorted out for you. Do I understand correctly that you are able to see the first tour of the Piazza San Marco? 1. Are you able to see all the videos in that tour? The Columns and the Ducal Palace, the Paper Gate, the Basilica and the Piazza? 2. What happens when you try to download the other tours? Do you get a message that says it is downloading and then nothing happens? Or do you not get the message that says it is downloading?

EDIT: OK. So, when you first download the app, we arranged that the first package of videos would download with the app. This is why you can see the all of the Piazza San Marco videos. We broke them up into five tours because the file sizes of the videos are enormous and many phones don't have enough storage to handle all of them. But the good news is that we know the app itself installed fine on your phone because you can see the Piazza San Marco videos. Next thing to try is to delete the videos in the Piazza San Marco, then try to download the videos from a different tour. If your phone is out of storage space, this will make enough room on your phone to download another tour. If you don't think storage space is the problem or if deleting the videos from the Piazza tour doesn't work, then let me know and I will do some more digging around. 

Thanks,
Smithsonian Journeys: Venice Development Team

reviews.review_description: Stuck at the download screen. Does not give the option to download all and just freezes.
Cannot get past the load screen. Was part of our day's homeschool curriculum.  Please fix!

Was missing Venice after a few months back from vacation and looked forward to breaking out my new Oculus Go. Only got as far as the big Venice text and text saying I need to download the Piazza tour and no download link or anything came up. Would be very happy if this could be worked out! Venice was such a beautiful city.
